title: C Variables And Printf
description: Practice declaring an integer and printing a formatted value.
learningGoals: Use an int variable in a simple printf expression.

completionChecks.prompt: What does %d tell printf to format?
completionChecks.explanation: %d formats an int as a signed decimal value.

completionChecks.prompt: What prints from count + 2 when count is 3?
completionChecks.explanation: The expression is evaluated before printf receives the value.
